name: Lucky Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Licensed South Florida pawnbroker offering collateral-based loans, buy/sell of jewelry, electronics, firearms, and vehicles across 4 locations since 2005.
description_long:
Lucky Pawn & Jewelry is a family-owned pawnbroker founded in 2005 and headquartered in Miami, FL, operating under the legal entity Sunoma Inc. Over more than two decades, the business has grown to four South Florida locations — Miami, Opa-Locka, Oakland Park, and Fort Lauderdale — serving a broad regional customer base. The company holds all required Florida state and municipal pawnbroker licenses, and also carries a Federal Firearms License (FFL #1-59-086-02-1A-31846) issued by the ATF, authorizing it to legally broker firearm sales and transfers. The business is led by president and owner Igor Melomed.

The core offering is collateral-based pawn loans: customers bring in an item of value, receive a same-day cash loan against it, and have 30 days plus a 30-day grace period to repay and reclaim their property. Renewals are available by paying accrued interest and resetting the principal. No credit check is required at any stage. Beyond lending, the shop actively buys and sells gold and diamond jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, tools, and vehicles including cars, trucks, and motorcycles. The firearms division adds meaningful depth — Lucky Pawn handles handgun and long-gun transactions and provides NFA (National Firearms Act) item transfers for $50 per firearm. In-store jewelry repair rounds out the service menu.

Few South Florida pawnbrokers operate at this scale or with this range. The FFL and NFA transfer capabilities attract gun owners who purchase firearms online and need a licensed local dealer to complete the legal transfer — a niche most competitors cannot serve. The family-owned structure allows deal flexibility that corporate chains often cannot match. Customer satisfaction is notably strong: a self-reported 4.9/5 rating across locations and a 5.0/5 score from 940 Google reviews at the Opa-Locka location — an unusually high mark for the pawn sector.

Lucky Pawn is a legitimate, well-reviewed operation for customers who need fast, no-credit-check liquidity in the South Florida area. That said, important limitations exist. Specific interest rates and fees are not publicly disclosed — borrowers must visit in-store to understand the full cost before committing. There is no online portal or mobile app; all transactions are in-person. No BBB rating or accreditation has been confirmed through public records. Most critically, pawn loans carry inherent forfeiture risk: any item not reclaimed within the 60-day window is permanently retained and resold by the shop, with no recovery path for the borrower. Pledging irreplaceable or high-sentimental-value items without a firm repayment plan is a meaningful financial risk.

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee — standard pawn model applies. Unredeemed items are forfeited and resold after the loan and grace period expire.

pros: No credit check required — pawn loans accessible regardless of credit history
Same-day cash disbursement on approved collateral
Licensed FFL dealer (ATF #1-59-086-02-1A-31846) enabling legal firearm and NFA item transfers
4 South Florida locations spanning Miami, Opa-Locka, Oakland Park, and Fort Lauderdale
20+ years in operation since 2005 under consistent family ownership
5.0/5 Google rating from 940 reviews at Opa-Locka location — unusually high for sector
NFA firearm transfer services available at a flat $50 per firearm fee
cons: Interest rates and loan fees not publicly disclosed — must inquire in-store before committing
No online portal or mobile app — all transactions require a physical visit
Items not redeemed within 60 days (30-day term + 30-day grace) are permanently forfeited with no recourse
No confirmed BBB rating or accreditation through public records
Fort Lauderdale location listed as active but specific address is unverified in public sources
best_for: South Florida residents needing fast, same-day cash without a credit check
Gun owners needing a licensed FFL dealer to complete online firearm or NFA item transfers
Buyers seeking below-retail secondhand jewelry, electronics, tools, or vehicles
Vehicle owners willing to use a car, truck, or motorcycle as loan collateral
diagnosis: Lucky Pawn & Jewelry is best suited for South Florida residents who need immediate cash against collateral and cannot or do not want to use traditional credit — or who need a licensed FFL dealer for firearm transfer services. The central caveat is transparency: interest rates are not disclosed publicly, and borrowers who miss the 60-day redemption window permanently lose their pledged item, making this a high-stakes option for anything of lasting value.
services: Collateral-based pawn loans (no credit check required)
Same-day cash advances against personal property
Gold and diamond jewelry buying and selling
Hand tools and power tools buying and selling
Vehicle pawning — cars, trucks, motorcycles accepted as collateral
Firearms buying and selling (handguns and long guns)
FFL dealer transfers for online firearm purchases
NFA item transfers ($50 flat fee per firearm)
Pawn loan renewals (interest payment resets principal)
